next_suggestion: 派生 FE-H-001 fix：frontend/src/components/ai/AiSettings.tsx + chatLoop.ts 加 URL scheme/host allowlist（route-fix，复用 opt-frontend-* worktree）
派生 FE-H-002 fix：frontend/src/stores/aiStore.ts DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS.allowMediumWithoutConfirm 改 false + systemPrompt 加 immutable-rules tag
派生 FE-M-001 fix：vite.config.ts host 改 127.0.0.1

audit_findings.finding: SSRF via user-controlled LLM base_url in provider_override persisted to localStorage without scheme/host validation
audit_findings.remediation: Add URL scheme allowlist (https only) + hostname blocklist (localhost/private ranges) in AiSettings.handleSave and chatLoop pre-send check

audit_findings.finding: Prompt injection bypasses medium-risk tool confirm; DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS.allowMediumWithoutConfirm=true lets AI silently execute 6 side-effect tools
audit_findings.remediation: Default allowMediumWithoutConfirm=false; add rate-limit/budget cap; wrap systemPrompt immutable rules in XML tag and concatenate programmatically

audit_findings.finding: Dev server binds 0.0.0.0 without allowedHosts — LAN-wide access to trading API proxy
audit_findings.remediation: Change host to 127.0.0.1 or configure explicit allowedHosts list
Add CSP meta tag in index.html; enforce via nginx/FastAPI in production

audit_findings.finding: localStorage stores API key + permissions in plaintext via zustand persist; no reset mechanism
audit_findings.remediation: Remove localApiKey from persist partialize; add permissions staleness reset; add reset-to-defaults button

audit_findings.finding: Runtime config JSON editor accepts arbitrary structure with no schema validation/diff/undo
audit_findings.remediation: Add JSON Schema whitelist for top-level keys; show diff preview; add undo button

audit_findings.finding: Route splat wildcard silently redirects typos to / without 404 feedback
audit_findings.remediation: Replace with NotFoundPage showing path-not-found message + similar route suggestions

audit_findings.finding: WebSocket reconnect has no max retry cap — infinite 30s loop on permanent backend outage
audit_findings.remediation: Add MAX_RETRIES (e.g. 50); emit _ws_status_gave_up event; show manual reconnect button

audit_findings.finding: Tool result truncation at 6000 chars via string slice may corrupt UTF-16 surrogate pairs or JSON
audit_findings.remediation: Use safe truncation ([...str].slice or TextEncoder) with ellipsis suffix
